arts.sum: Jan Paul van Hecke has been a regular at Brighton & Hove Albion since the start of last season. The centre-back’s performances for the Seagulls saw him make his debut for the Netherlands in September. He missed October’s international break due to an injury and returned to the national team squad last month.
